channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

item.title: LGBTQ+ pop-up in former Sydney church ordered to cancel ‘offensive’ events after religious protest - The Guardian
